== Notes for [[Item:Q82149|Q82149]] ==

ID: I84731

Name: Calpurnia Pisa

Given Name: Calpurnia

Surname: Pisa

Sex: F

_UID: F822157B54548947B9F4202727AD6158A3FC

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 106

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus

Married:

Children

Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus b: ABT 123

Cornelia Salvidienus b: ABT 137

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84731

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
